sections.paragraph:
- Original: εὖ

- Transliteration: Eu

- Phonetic: yoo

- Definition:

1. to be well off, fare well, prosper

2. acting well

- Origin: neuter of a primary eus (good)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Neuter of a primary word εὖς eus (good); (adverbially) well: - good well (done).
